---
title: MAIM Final Project
author: "Pippi de Bree"
format: pdf
code-overflow: wrap
---

```{r, include=FALSE}

library(tidyverse)



```


Things to read/consider before: 
- https://www.researchgate.net/publication/220868086_A_Similarity_Measure_for_Sequences_of_Categorical_Data_Based_on_the_Ordering_of_Common_Elements
- https://www.zotero.org/pippidebree/items/P75893RK/reader
- https://academic.oup.com/jrsssa/article/179/2/481/7068212?login=true


Data (Requested Access - Write a little about that): 
https://sites.google.com/view/dataminingcompetition2019/dataset?authuser=0



```{r}

```
